name: Zhou Xun
page_title: Zhou Xun 周循 [Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Zhou Xun was the oldest son of Zhou Yu (Gongjin), who served Sun Ce and Sun Quan. He served as a Cavalry Commandant in Eastern Wu and married Sun Quan’s daughter Sun Luban. He was also said to resemble his father in personality and to have inherited his ability, but he died at the age of 17.

full_text:
Zhou Xun 周循
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Xun (周循). The eldest son of Zhou Yu. Said to have inherited his father’s ability, but died at age 17. Zhou Xun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.

BiographyHistoric (Unverified)
Zhou Xun was the oldest son of Zhou Yu (Gongjin), who served Sun Ce and Sun Quan. He served as a Cavalry Commandant in Eastern Wu and married Sun Quan’s daughter Sun Luban. He was also said to resemble his father in personality and to have inherited his ability, but he died at the age of 17.
